name: Bond Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Bond Community Center in Oconto, WI! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: GBTC
description: GBTC is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tremble, WI. There are 6 indoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Oconto Falls High School
description: Oconto Falls High School is a place to play pickleball in Oconto Falls, WI. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Pleasant View Park
description: Pleasant View Park is a place to play pickleball in Oconto Falls, WI. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Sharp Park
description: Sharp Park is a place to play pickleball in Oconto, WI. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
